features.name: shift right with large replication operand
features.description: Code should include a shift right operation where the operand is created by replication with a large count (e.g., {N{var}} where N > 20), creating an oversized bit vector for the shift amount

features.name: concatenation with shift operations in both directions
features.description: Code should include a concatenation that combines a right shift and a left shift expression, where each shift has different operand characteristics
